prompt: Run Stage 5 implementation decomposition on the dashboard performance optimization task. Stage 4 is complete. Decompose the full-stack optimization into execution-ready subtasks suitable for parallel execution by multiple agents.

assertions.text: All 4 decomposition artifacts created with all required template sections
Backend subtasks (ClickHouse fix, cache, parallelization) and frontend subtasks (hook, downsampling, component refactoring) are separated and can run in parallel across waves
Retention cohort bug fix (queries.go:67-85) is an independent subtask or part of a foundation subtask with no blocking dependencies
Cache subtask (chart_cache.go) is correctly identified as a dependency for the service parallelization subtask
Frontend useChartQuery hook is correctly identified as a dependency for Overview.tsx refactoring
Conflict zones identified where service.go integration depends on both cache and ClickHouse changes
Coverage reviewer returns COVERAGE_OK — all 7 acceptance criteria mapped
Execution waves maximize parallelism: independent backend and frontend streams can run simultaneously
